currentStageTitle: Stage V3.1-M1 — The semantic move stream (transition layer; architecture before art) (V3.1 presentation sprint on the LOCKED v3 engine; see docs/ROADMAP-V3.1-UI.md §M1)
nextAction: Stage V3.1-M1 (per docs/ROADMAP-V3.1-UI.md §M1) — build the semantic move stream: the §3b fix for 'snaps instead of animates'. Diff old→new observableState and emit typed semantic Moves ('card hand→discard', 'token A→B', 'score 4→7'), then play them through an animation queue. Deliverables: (1) src/ui-v3/moves.ts with `diffObservable(prevObs, nextObs) → Move[]` — PURE, typed, derived ONLY from the two fog projections (leak-safe by construction, respects D2); (2) a GSAP animation queue that sequences Move[] through timelines AND has a synchronous INSTANT mode (jsdom/reduced-motion collapse to synchronous DOM settlement); (3) a Howler SoundManager skeleton — `play(moveType)`, silent in tests. Exit metrics (all vitest-enforced): every v3 command type over full simmed games produces a typed Move[] (an exhaustive `Record<CommandType, …>` makes misses a compile error); same seed + command script → byte-identical move stream (2 seeds); fog leak test (serialized move stream per viewerSeat never contains redacted token content or the seed); replay test (instant-mode playback settles to DOM identical to a cold render — 'snap count 0'); full suite green. Guardrails (ROADMAP-V3.1-UI §3): engine untouched/balance LOCKED (no src/v2, src/v3, src/utils or tunable edits — read-only imports of types/observableState only); fog (D2) extends to presentation (no mid-animation leak); every animation path has a synchronous instant mode; no Math.random (presentational jitter via a dedicated SeededRandom that never touches GameState); runtime deps limited to pinned gsap+howler.
specRefs: docs/DESIGN-V3-ALGORITHM.md — ⭐ §13 (authoritative build checklist + P0 fixes), §12 (edge cases), §9 (tunable registry), §7 D1–D9 (determinism contract incl. the observableState fog projection)

sim-results/sample-v3/REPORT.md (herald-OFF default reference); the T2-V 40-seed run dirs sim-results/v3-s20260622-n40{,-bp,-herald} + sim-results/v3-s20260717-n40{,-bp}
docs/human-playtest-checklist-v3.md + docs/v3-teach-script.md (the V3-6 playtest walkthrough + teaching script); index-v3.html + src/ui-v3 (the fog-respecting render-from-state UI)
invariants: All mutation goes through applyCommand (src/v3/reducer.ts) — no direct state mutation elsewhere
No Math.random / Date.now / any under src/ — all RNG via SeededRandom (ALGORITHM §7) (engine+sim scoped for src/ui-v3 — see the dated scoping decision below)

2026-07-18 — Determinism invariant SCOPED (V3.1 sprint; docs/ROADMAP-V3.1-UI.md §3): the 'no Math.random/Date.now under src/' rule is ENGINE+SIM scoped (src/v2, src/v3, src/utils). The presentation layer (src/ui-v3) MAY use requestAnimationFrame / GSAP internal timing, but still NO Math.random — presentational jitter uses a dedicated SeededRandom instance that never touches GameState — and no timing value ever feeds back into game state or commands.

Determinism §7 D1–D9: tokens are pre-bound & fogged via a namespaced SeededRandom(hash(seed, nodeId)) (D1/D9); observableState(state, viewerSeat) redacts token content AND the seed (D2) — it never leaks unflipped tokens or the seed; AI/human/wraith all decide from observableState (a pure f(observableState, seed))
Balance is LOCKED at the T2-3 herald-OFF numbers — no edits to src/v3/tunables.ts / tunables.gen.ts / any tunable value; band misses are recorded, never tuned
Blood Pact (flag on) only: an eliminated traitor still wins on a later doom/attrition (the win-check reads bloodPactHolder regardless of elimination); competitive mode (flag off) is byte-identical
gotchas: vitest output buffers when piped through `tail` — redirect to a file, or use the JSON reporter (verify.mjs does)
Run `npm run verify` to (re)populate the lastVerified block; never hand-edit lastVerified/dirty (script-owned by verify.mjs)

verify.mjs now lints `eslint src/ tests/` (whole repo) and runs `vitest run tests` (the FULL suite — utils/v2/v3, all green, ~1,14x tests). The v3 UI lives in src/ui-v3 (entry index-v3.html) and IS in scope; tsc --noEmit covers all of src/. Validate UI changes with `npm run dev` / `npx vite build`.

ACTION pointer quirk (inherited from v2): after the LAST player in turnOrder exhausts actions, advanceActivePlayer leaves activePlayerIndex ON that player (turnOrderPosition === turnOrder.length). Any per-player action loop must ALSO stop on actionsRemaining===0, not just the index — else it re-enters a 0-action player (runAITurn handles this).

BYTE-IDENTICAL SCOPE: the competitive (flag-off) sim is byte-identical to sim-results/sample-v3; the difficulty `warlord` tier = the DEFAULT = the locked balance (byte-identical, re-verified). The two sim-neutral human-only commands SET_WRAITH_INPUT / SET_BEQUEST are UI-only and do NOT perturb the sim. Herald default-OFF (3-archetype); enabling Herald+PARLEY is the advanced path.
openRisks: DATA/*.JSON DRIFT (v3 data split owed) — data/tunables.json + data/archetypes.json still list removed Broken/Rescue levers (e.g. rescueWillingness); these are INERT (the v3 engine reads src/v3/tunables.gen.ts, not data/). A `npm run gen:data` resync is owed once v3 gets its own data/ dir. The 4 court tunables (MARSHAL_POWER / STEWARD_POWER / HERALD_PIECE_POWER / STEWARD_INCOME) + the T2 literals are plain literals in src/v3/tunables.ts pending that split. (ROADMAP-V3 §0 recorded debt.)

DIFFICULTY-TIER MAGNITUDES STALE POST-T2-1 — the knight/squire tier magnitudes are stale after T2-1 (feed-the-court); tier monotonicity is test-verified, but recalibrate at the next difficulty-touching stage (the V3-6 playtest picks the shipped default). (ROADMAP-V3 §8 T2-1.)
T2-4 WRAITH IS PLAYTEST-GATED — the Wraith re-tune awaits the human playtest signal; not scheduled as sim work. (ROADMAP-V3 §8 T2-3.)

T2-V FRESH-SEED BP-EXPOSURE EDGE (user call) — fresh seed 20260717 read BP exposure 71.4% (+1.4pp over the 40–70 ceiling) with traitor-win healthy mid-band (16.4%); recorded-not-tuned per the fresh-seed band-miss protocol. T-004 is set BLOCKED for the user to decide whether a +1.4pp fresh-seed exposure edge warrants action. (ROADMAP-V3 §8 2026-07-17 T2-V.)
